programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: At Jorge Chávez Airport in Lima, Peru, agents hold a Spanish passenger when they discover that their suitcases conceal almost 10 kilos of cocaine.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: A young man seems unaware he's committed a crime, despite being caught carrying 30 times the legal amount of marijuana. At the docks, a shipment of hats raises suspicions.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: After a woman's bag is flagged in an X-ray, the police officers must decide whether they let her go or destroy the bag.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Contraband Capture
programs.desc: Florida agents intercept a boat carrying 10 pounds of marijuana leaving the U.S.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: An elderly woman tries to traffic cocaine, one of the largest shipments seized at the airport; an Indonesian passenger claims to be the victim of a hoax; three other young people are arrested trying to smuggle drugs in different ways.

programs.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Peru
programs.desc: A passenger behaves erratically, and a woman breaks out in tears; a man admits necessity led him to commit a crime; a suspicious bag might contain drugs.
